Class VaccinationRecord

java.lang.Object
shelter.domain.VaccinationRecord
All Implemented Interfaces:
Comparable<VaccinationRecord>
public class VaccinationRecord extends Object implements Comparable<VaccinationRecord>
Represents a single vaccination event for an animal in the shelter system. Each record captures which animal received which vaccine and on what date, allowing the system to determine whether vaccinations are current or overdue.

  • Constructor Details

    • VaccinationRecord

      public VaccinationRecord(String id, String animalId, String vaccineTypeId, LocalDate dateAdministered)
      Reconstruction constructor for deserializing a VaccinationRecord from persistent storage. This constructor accepts an explicit id so the original record identifier is preserved when reloading vaccination history from CSV data.
      Parameters:
      id - the pre-existing unique identifier; must not be null or blank
      animalId - the ID of the animal that received the vaccine; must not be null or blank
      vaccineTypeId - the ID of the vaccine type administered; must not be null or blank
      dateAdministered - the date the vaccine was given; must not be null
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if any parameter is null or blank

    • VaccinationRecord

      public VaccinationRecord(String animalId, String vaccineTypeId, LocalDate dateAdministered)
      Constructs a new VaccinationRecord for the given animal, vaccine type, and date. A unique ID is generated automatically at construction time.
      Parameters:
      animalId - the ID of the animal that received the vaccine; must not be null or blank
      vaccineTypeId - the ID of the vaccine type administered; must not be null or blank
      dateAdministered - the date the vaccine was given; must not be null
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if any parameter is null or blank

    • VaccinationRecord

      public VaccinationRecord(VaccinationRecord other)
      Copy constructor that creates a new VaccinationRecord with all field values copied from other. The copy preserves the same ID, animal, vaccine type, and administration date.
      Parameters:
      other - the VaccinationRecord instance to copy; must not be null

  • Method Details

    • getId

      public String getId()
      Returns the unique identifier of this vaccination record. The ID is generated automatically at construction time and never changes.
      Returns:
      the UUID string identifying this record

    • getAnimalId

      public String getAnimalId()
      Returns the ID of the animal that received the vaccine.
      Returns:
      the animal's ID string

    • getVaccineTypeId

      public String getVaccineTypeId()
      Returns the ID of the vaccine type that was administered.
      Returns:
      the vaccine type's ID string

    • getDateAdministered

      public LocalDate getDateAdministered()
      Returns the date on which the vaccine was administered.
      Returns:
      the date administered

    • compareTo

      public int compareTo(VaccinationRecord other)
      Compares this record to another by date administered ascending. Earlier records are ordered first, reflecting chronological vaccination history.
      Specified by:
      compareTo in interface Comparable<VaccinationRecord>
      Parameters:
      other - the other VaccinationRecord to compare to
      Returns:
      a negative number if this record was administered earlier, positive if later, zero if equal

    • equals

      public boolean equals(Object o)
      Returns true if the given object is a VaccinationRecord with the same ID.
      Overrides:
      equals in class Object
      Parameters:
      o - the object to compare
      Returns:
      true if o is a VaccinationRecord with the same ID

    • hashCode

      public int hashCode()
      Returns a hash code based on this record's unique ID. Consistent with equals(Object).
      Overrides:
      hashCode in class Object
      Returns:
      the hash code

    • toString

      public String toString()
      Returns a string representation of this vaccination record including its ID, animal, vaccine, and date.
      Overrides:
      toString in class Object
      Returns:
      a human-readable description of this vaccination record
